speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Bring forth these men.—

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Bushy and Green, I will not vex your souls,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Since presently your souls must part your bodies,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: With too much urging your pernicious lives,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: For ’twere no charity; yet to wash your blood

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: From off my hands, here in the view of men

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: I will unfold some causes of your deaths:

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: You have misled a prince, a royal king,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: A happy gentleman in blood and lineaments

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: By you unhappied and disfigured clean.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: You have in manner with your sinful hours

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Made a divorce betwixt his queen and him,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Broke the possession of a royal bed,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: And stained the beauty of a fair queen’s cheeks

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: With tears drawn from her eyes by your foul wrongs.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Myself, a prince by fortune of my birth,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Near to the King in blood, and near in love

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Till you did make him misinterpret me,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Have stooped my neck under your injuries

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: And sighed my English breath in foreign clouds,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Eating the bitter bread of banishment,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Whilst you have fed upon my seigniories,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Disparked my parks and felled my forest woods,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: From my own windows torn my household coat,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Rased out my imprese, leaving me no sign,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Save men’s opinions and my living blood,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: To show the world I am a gentleman.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: This and much more, much more than twice all this,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Condemns you to the death.—See them delivered over

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: To execution and the hand of death.

speaker: BUSHY
text: More welcome is the stroke of death to me

speaker: BUSHY
text: Than Bolingbroke to England. Lords, farewell.

speaker: GREEN
text: My comfort is that heaven will take our souls

speaker: GREEN
text: And plague injustice with the pains of hell.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: My Lord Northumberland, see them dispatched.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text:
To
                 
                York
                .
                 
              Uncle, you say the Queen is at your house.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: For God’s sake, fairly let her be entreated.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Tell her I send to her my kind commends.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Take special care my greetings be delivered.

speaker: YORK
text: A gentleman of mine I have dispatched

speaker: YORK
text: With letters of your love to her at large.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: Thanks, gentle uncle.—Come, lords, away,

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: To fight with Glendower and his complices.

speaker: BOLINGBROKE
text: A while to work, and after holiday.
